seo.title: Butterscotch sauce for ice cream - 3 ingredients - Marinda Kook

html:
It's Mother's Day today and it's being celebrated at my house. We decided to make pancakes, ice cream, bananas and a deep-delicious caramel sauce. It tasted so good and I'd love to share it with you.

 

INGREDIENTS:

  • 1/2 cup butter (125ml)
  • 1 cup brown sugar (250ml)
  • 1 cup cream (250ml)
  • pinch of salt

NOW:

Melt the butter in a saucepan on the stove.

 

Stir in the brown sugar and pinch of salt until dissolved. Simmer gently for about 3 minutes.

 

 

Stir in the cream and leave for about 5 minutes on the stove until it starts to thicken.

 

Now enjoy the decadent sauce with whatever your heart desires. Delicious just on its own over ice cream!
